title: Basic JavaScript Canvas API
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Canvas API. Focus on implementing Canvas context (2D) correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Canvas API
description: Create a function that uses Canvas context (2D) and Drawing shapes and paths together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Canvas API Project
description: Build a small application that applies Canvas context (2D), Drawing shapes and paths, Colors and gradients in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Canvas API
description: The following code has bugs related to Canvas context (2D). Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Canvas API
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Canvas context (2D) and Drawing shapes and paths.
